article_meta.title: Defense Coast Guard denies report it won't classify swastikas, nooses as hate symbols by Filip Timotija 11/20/25 03:23 P

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted statements from sources as author bias and added a questionable omission claim. It did not confine analysis to the author’s own prose.
